title: Wolf Infection
body:
![banenr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e82c86bd39287474370e1c10a76b3c068e365ebf.png)
# **Mod Description**

Wolf Infection turns Minecraft’s loyal canines into a rapidly spreading, pack-building menace. With this mod, wolves will hunt and attack every mob they see — passive, neutral, or hostile.

And the twist?
Any mob killed by a wolf is reborn as another wolf.
The infection spreads. The pack grows. Nature fights back.



## **Features:**

- Wolves now attack all mobs
- When a mob dies to a wolf they become another wolf
